parsed_output.justification: Mitchell explicitly admitted twice to starting as a Werewolf. While he later claimed he might not be a Werewolf anymore due to potential role swaps, this is a common bluff used by Werewolves to avoid elimination. Although Eric also claimed to be a Werewolf, his claims were contradictory and sudden, making him more likely to be the Tanner attempting to attract votes.
